◎简　　介  

　　Natives of a tropical island have to contend with man-eating plants and animals, mutations caused by radioactivity. Virgin sacrifices become the norm. A small group of interlopers become caught up in the mayhem.....(机译)一个热带岛屿的当地人不得不与所造成的放射性吃人的植物和动物，基因突变。处女牺牲成为常态。一小群闯入者成为陷入了混乱。
